artistContext.name: Seth Troxler
artistContext.summary: As a comparable youth on the scene, Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene. Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With much-hyped and played releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive sexy techno sound.

writer.title: Seth Troxler: A Young Force in Techno
writer.subtitle: Detroit roots and Berlin relocation mark a rapid ascent in the European techno scene.
writer.author: A. Stern
writer.excerpt: Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler has quickly established himself as a significant presence in the techno scene despite his young age. His Detroit roots are unmistakable, and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.
Troxler's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. These elements contribute to his distinctive sound.

With releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, Troxler has built a reputation for his distinctive techno sound. His recent releases include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.

Troxler's work is characterized by a blend of techno, minimal, and minimal techno styles. His sound has been well-received in both Detroit and Berlin, marking him as an artist to watch in the coming years.
